channel.title: Comments on: Episode 20 – Collaboration Not Litigation Ale
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Tony
item.dc:creator: Tony
item.description: Love the episode, have a bottle of this in my cellar, would love to do a tasting with both salvation's and this beer. Would make for a great episode as well. Keep up the great work!
item.content:encoded: Love the episode, have a bottle of this in my cellar, would love to do a tasting with both salvation’s and this beer. Would make for a great episode as well. Keep up the great work!
